summary: Thermal Ticket 80mm Feature Testing - All 7 features VERIFIED. Ticket demo page loads correctly with full DGII-compliant ticket preview. Tax breakdown shows ITBIS (18%) and Propina Legal (10%) properly. Propina correctly omitted for Llevar/Delivery service types. All ticket options (NCF types, COPIA, ANULADO, barcode) work correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Page /ticket-demo loads correctly with ticket preview - PASS
TEST 2: Ticket shows business header (RESTAURANTE DEMO, RNC: 1-31-12345-6, address, phone) - PASS
TEST 3: Ticket shows NCF section (COMPROBANTE FISCAL, NCF number, type, validity) - PASS
TEST 4: Ticket shows tax breakdown (ITBIS 18%, PROPINA LEY 10%) for Local service - PASS
TEST 5: Propina Legal omitted for 'Llevar' service type (takeout) - PASS
TEST 6: Propina Legal omitted for 'Delivery' service type - PASS
TEST 7: Propina Legal restored when switching back to 'Local' service - PASS
TEST 8: NCF type changes work (B01 Crédito Fiscal, B02 Consumidor Final, B14 Gubernamental, B15 Régimen Especial) - PASS
TEST 9: COPIA checkbox adds '--- COPIA ---' marker with dashed border - PASS
TEST 10: ANULADO checkbox adds '*** ANULADO ***' marker with red border - PASS
TEST 11: Barcode toggle shows/hides NCF barcode - PASS
TEST 12: Random data button updates ticket with new items and totals - PASS
TEST 13: IMPRIMIR button visible and accessible - PASS
TEST 14: All ticket structure elements verified (header, NCF, items, taxes, total, footer) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: ThermalTicket component properly implements DGII-compliant 80mm thermal ticket format
Monospace font (Roboto Mono) used for column alignment - correct implementation
Tax breakdown correctly calculates Total Impuestos = ITBIS + PROPINA
Propina logic in TicketDemo.js correctly sets propina_legal to 0 for non-dine_in orders
printTicket function creates proper print window with all CSS styles embedded
Component properly integrated in PaymentScreen.js for post-payment ticket printing
seed_data_creation: Used hardcoded DEMO_BILL data in TicketDemo.js for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Thermal ticket 80mm feature fully functional. ThermalTicket component at frontend/src/components/ThermalTicket.js with printTicket utility. TicketDemo page at /ticket-demo for testing. Component integrated in PaymentScreen.js for post-payment printing. Key behavior: Propina Legal (10%) automatically removed for takeout/delivery orders.

features_verified.ncf_section: PASS - NCF number, type (Crédito Fiscal/Consumidor Final/etc), validity date
features_verified.tax_breakdown: PASS - ITBIS 18%, PROPINA LEY 10%, Total Impuestos
features_verified.propina_for_local: PASS - Propina included for 'Para comer aquí' (dine_in)
features_verified.ncf_type_change: PASS - B01, B02, B14, B15 all work correctly
features_verified.copia_marker: PASS - '--- COPIA ---' shown with dashed border
features_verified.anulado_marker: PASS - '*** ANULADO ***' shown with red border
features_verified.barcode_toggle: PASS - Barcode visible by default, can be toggled
features_verified.random_data: PASS - Refresh button generates new random order
features_verified.print_button: PASS - IMPRIMIR button accessible in header

ticket_structure_verified.ncf_display: COMPROBANTE FISCAL section with NCF number and type
ticket_structure_verified.items_detalle: Product name, quantity, unit price, total with modifiers
ticket_structure_verified.total_section: TOTAL A PAGAR with RD$ amount in inverted colors
ticket_structure_verified.footer: Thank you message and DGII notice
